name: Murchison Falls: The Awarded Wildlife Adventure with Elephants, Lions and Hyenas

reviews.review_description: Ebyjoyed wacting  wacting the animal s it's was a good Video

This was really good for the £2.99 price. I was particularly pleased that it didn’t show any killing, just animals living their lives.  I would have loved to have seen some hippos up close. On the whole, a lovely little film, quite clear graphics and a great way of seeing these beautiful animals up close without the risk of being torn limb from limb, thank you for producing it.

developer_response.body: Hi Alimichele, Thank you for kind words and happy to hear you enjoyed the movie experience of being out there with the animals. Best Team VR Gorilla

reviews.review_description: The color and clarity, and all those jaw-dropping moments, make this the best VR video I've seen. Well worth the couple bucks. I love Africa vids, but never appreciated the sheer SIZE of it all. The 3D effects are subtle and awesome.  That hyena!

developer_response.body: Thank you BRin. Happy to hear you enjoyed it! Best Team VR Gorilla

reviews.review_description: This movie is exceptional, one of the best VR Nature movies I've seen so far. Great storytelling, beautiful images, amazing wildlife scenes. Loved every minute of it. Just wow.

Purchased for my children but every time i click play it goes on to the download screen and takes an age to download then when it completes and i click play it goes back to the download screen again. 
Has anyone else encountered this problem ?

developer_response.body: Hi Russboy, could it be that your device doesn't have enough free space for the video? This error can then occur, so it is probably the issue. If the download is slow, this could be because of your internet connection. Also, restarting your device might help. Hope this helps, and if so, please let us know, and if willing, adjust your rating accordingly. Best Team VR Gorilla.

reviews.review_description: This video was an African dream until they ruined it with the destruction by human. Because of this I will not be able to watch this whenever I want to go to Africa. Also. It’s blurry

Great experience. Watching the animals up close in their natural habitat felt really special and even emotional at times. You are really there, alone with the animals and it has some incredible encounters. Amazing
It is fine mostly about elephant. And it's only 25 minutes.   I think it's worth$ 1.99. show you we can see more of the Savannah
